clinical_note: Synthetic note: Patient with focal epilepsy and focal impaired awareness seizures. EEG showed left temporal epileptiform activity and MRI was unremarkable. The patient has tried levetiracetam and lamotrigine but continues to report monthly seizures. Past history includes anxiety.

Synthetic note: Patient diagnosed with generalised epilepsy. Seizures are currently controlled on valproate with no events reported for 18 months. EEG previously showed generalised spike-wave discharges. No major psychiatric comorbidity documented.

Synthetic note: Patient with suspected temporal lobe epilepsy. MRI showed right hippocampal sclerosis. Treatment history includes carbamazepine, levetiracetam and lacosamide. Seizures persist despite multiple anti-seizure medications, suggesting drug-resistant epilepsy. Depression is also documented.

Synthetic note: Episodes were captured on video-EEG without epileptiform correlate. The final diagnosis was functional non-epileptic seizures. No anti-seizure medication is currently prescribed. The patient reports stress-related episodes and comorbid anxiety.

Synthetic note: Patient with focal epilepsy treated with lamotrigine. EEG was normal between events. Seizure frequency has reduced from weekly to one episode every six months. Migraine is noted in the past medical history.

Synthetic note: Patient with epilepsy following traumatic brain injury. Current medications include levetiracetam, clobazam and topiramate. Ongoing nocturnal seizures are reported. ECG was normal. Sleep disturbance is also described.

Synthetic note: Patient with childhood-onset generalised epilepsy. The patient previously used ethosuximide and later switched to lamotrigine. No seizures have been reported for two years. EEG findings have improved compared with previous recordings.

Synthetic note: Patient with focal seizures and possible temporal onset. The patient has failed trials of oxcarbazepine and levetiracetam. Video-EEG confirmed epileptic seizures. Persistent seizures and memory complaints are documented.
